calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Wednesday, December 9, 2015, in Department 525.
Louis Topper, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
DEEZER INC., Appellant/Defendant appears by Chief Marketing Officer Beth Murphy and Office Manager Michelle Chang.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Louis Topper testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: exhibit not marked - Contract.

Beth Murphy testifies on behalf of DEEZER INC. and responds to the questions from the court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly unmarked exhibit is retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant; Clerk Jean Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-16-2015 Judgment Entered
